# US Address Generator

> Free browser-based random address generator for US state and international test data.
> Built for software testing, QA, form-validation demos, seed records, and placeholder data.
> Not for fraud, identity claims, account abuse, or rule evasion.

## Key facts

- Canonical URL: https://usaddregen.com/
- Languages: English (default), Simplified Chinese (zh-CN), Traditional Chinese (zh-TW).
- No backend API: generation runs in the browser over static datasets.
- Output fields: full name, street address, city, state/region, postal or ZIP code, phone number.
- Compliance: synthetic, realistic-format only; not deliverable; will fail real USPS/AVS/bank/shipping verification.

## US state address generators

- [Alabama (AL) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/alabama/): 4% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 35, 36; area codes 205, 251, 256, 334, 938; sample cities Birmingham, Montgomery, Huntsville.
- [Alaska (AK) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/alaska/): 0% statewide sales tax; ZIP prefixes 99; area codes 907; sample cities Anchorage, Fairbanks, Juneau, Sitka, Ketchikan.
- [Arizona (AZ) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/arizona/): 5.6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 85, 86; area codes 480, 520, 602, 623, 928; sample cities Phoenix, Tucson, Mesa.
- [Arkansas (AR) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/arkansas/): 6.5% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 71, 72; area codes 327, 479, 501, 870; sample cities Little Rock, Fayetteville, Fort Smith.
- [California (CA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/california/): 7.25% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 90, 91, 92, 93, 94, 95, 96; area codes 209, 213, 310, 323, 408, 415, 510, 530, 559, 619, 626, 650, 661, 707, 714, 760, 805, 818, 831, 858, 909, 916, 925, 949, 951; sample cities Los Angeles, San Diego, San Jose.
- [Colorado (CO) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/colorado/): 2.9% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 80, 81; area codes 303, 719, 720, 970; sample cities Denver, Colorado Springs, Aurora.
- [Connecticut (CT) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/connecticut/): 6.35% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 06; area codes 203, 475, 860, 959; sample cities Bridgeport, Stamford, New Haven.
- [Delaware (DE) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/delaware/): 0% statewide sales tax; ZIP prefixes 19; area codes 302; sample cities Wilmington, Dover, Newark, Middletown, Lewes.
- [Florida (FL) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/florida/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 32, 33, 34; area codes 239, 305, 321, 352, 386, 407, 561, 727, 754, 772, 786, 813, 850, 863, 904, 941, 954; sample cities Jacksonville, Miami, Tampa.
- [Georgia (GA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/georgia/): 4% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 30, 31, 398, 399; area codes 229, 404, 470, 478, 678, 706, 762, 770, 912; sample cities Atlanta, Augusta, Columbus.
- [Hawaii (HI) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/hawaii/): 4% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 967, 968; area codes 808; sample cities Honolulu, Hilo, Kailua.
- [Idaho (ID) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/idaho/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 83; area codes 208, 986; sample cities Boise, Meridian, Nampa.
- [Illinois (IL) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/illinois/): 6.25% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 60, 61, 62; area codes 217, 224, 309, 312, 331, 447, 464, 618, 630, 708, 773, 779, 815, 847, 872; sample cities Chicago, Aurora, Naperville.
- [Indiana (IN) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/indiana/): 7% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 46, 47; area codes 219, 260, 317, 463, 574, 765, 812, 930; sample cities Indianapolis, Fort Wayne, Evansville.
- [Iowa (IA) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/iowa/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 50, 51, 52; area codes 319, 515, 563, 641, 712; sample cities Des Moines, Cedar Rapids, Davenport.

- [Maryland (MD) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/maryland/): 6% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 20, 21; area codes 227, 240, 301, 410, 443, 667; sample cities Baltimore, Frederick, Rockville.

- [Nevada (NV) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/nevada/): 6.85% statewide base sales tax; ZIP prefixes 89; area codes 702, 725, 775; sample cities Las Vegas, Henderson, Reno.
- [New Hampshire (NH) address generator](https://usaddregen.com/state/new-hampshire/): 0% statewide sales tax; ZIP prefixes 03; area codes 603; sample cities Manchester, Nashua, Concord, Portsmouth, Dover.

## Source notes

- USPS ZIP Code Lookup / Postal Explorer; lastVerified 2026-06-29
- NANPA area-code maps; lastVerified 2026-06-29
- Sales Tax Institute state-level rate chart, compiled from state Department of Revenue materials and rate providers; lastVerified 2026-06-29
- USPS ZIP Code Lookup plus major-city population ordering; lastVerified 2026-06-29

## International generators

- [Nigeria address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/nigeria/): Lagos, Ikeja, Abuja, Kano, Port Harcourt, Ibadan; +234 phone format.
- [Egypt address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/egypt/): Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, Luxor, Mansoura; +20 phone format.
- [Turkey address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/turkey/): Istanbul, Ankara, Izmir, Antalya, Bursa; +90 phone format.
- [Pakistan address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/pakistan/): Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Peshawar; +92 phone format.
- [India address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/india/): Mumbai, Delhi, Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad; +91 phone format.
- [Philippines address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/philippines/): Manila, Quezon City, Makati, Cebu City, Davao City; +63 phone format.
- [Indonesia address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/indonesia/): Jakarta, Surabaya, Bandung, Medan, Denpasar; +62 phone format.
- [Brazil address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/brazil/): Sao Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Brasilia, Salvador, Curitiba; +55 phone format.
- [Mexico address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/mexico/): Mexico City, Guadalajara, Monterrey, Puebla, Tijuana; +52 phone format.
- [United Kingdom address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/united-kingdom/): London, Manchester, Birmingham, Edinburgh, Cardiff; +44 phone format.
- [Canada address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/canada/): Toronto, Montreal, Vancouver, Calgary, Ottawa; +1 phone format.
- [Australia address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/australia/): Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide; +61 phone format.
- [Japan address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/japan/): Tokyo, Osaka, Yokohama, Nagoya, Sapporo; +81 phone format.
- [France address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/france/): Paris, Lyon, Marseille, Toulouse, Nice; +33 phone format.
- [China Mainland address generator](https://usaddregen.com/country/china-mainland/): Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Hangzhou; +86 phone format.
